venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 8, 2026 Updated: May 8, 2026 No Comments 3 Min
reviews.rating_raw: The Reviews Hub Star Rating 80 % 80% A deft comic monologue
reviews.excerpt: Annie Hughes, as played by writer/performer Ellie Ross, is cheerfuly meandering through life when her posh parents make her an offer she should probably refuse. If she gets married by the age of 35, they’ll give her £150,000. This is an hour of tightly written, well-paced comic monologue.
